top_signals.title: Americans’ July 4 celebrations come with highest-ever price tag
top_signals.summary: Tariffs and war in Iran have kept food and gasoline prices elevated as country marks 250th birthday
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Cboe Seeks to List Prediction Market Type Options on Earnings Metrics
top_signals.summary: Cboe Global Markets Inc. is seeking US regulatory approval to list all-or-nothing options tied to corporate earnings results, allowing traders to wager on figures ranging from SpaceX revenue and Nvidia data-center sales to JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s credit-loss provisions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: How AI Creates Jobs
top_signals.summary: Lisa Simon, Chief Economist at Revelio Labs joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why a weaker-than-expected jobs report doesn't tell the whole story. Using hiring data from LinkedIn, Glassdoor, H-1B visa filings, she argues AI is helping fuel hiring, She explains why companies investing most heavily in AI are expanding both entry-level and experienced roles. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: OpenAI proposes 5% stake to Trump administration to ease Washington pressure: Report
top_signals.summary: Trump said in June that the U.S. taking an ownership stake in AI giants would be "a beautiful thing" and make American public "partners in this revolution."
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump’s $1bn plan to remake America’s capital
top_signals.summary: The US president calls it a ‘gift’ to the nation. Critics say he is racing past checks to stamp his mark on the capital

top_signals.title: Extreme Weather Will Upend U.S.-China Competition
top_signals.summary: The cost of falling behind on climate adaptation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Solana Foundation launches framework for protocol-level governance
top_signals.summary: The Solana Foundation launched a framework for protocol-level governance, enabling validators with at least 100,000 delegated SOL to publish new proposals.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX may emerge as ultimate blueprint for new wave of mega-cap IPOs
top_signals.summary: "It would not surprise me at all to see a similar dynamic play out with some of these [IPOs] set to come in the months ahead," the Kathmere Capital CIO says.

top_signals.title: Cruyff turn: Starmer allows pubs to stay open for England World Cup game
top_signals.summary: Sir Keir Starmer has performed a Cruyff turn as he announced that pubs would be able to stay open until 5am for England’s game against Mexico on late Sunday night. Before the change in policy, pubs were set to be forced to kick punters out at half time in the early hours of Monday morning. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
